title: Elders (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:NightsisterElder-GH.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A Nightsister Elder]]
Many civilizations, cultures, and organizations in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] operated with the notion of legislating councils of '''Elders''' or referred to themselves as '''Elders'''. These included:

==[[Canon]]==
*The title '''[[Elder (title)|Elder]]''' used by various beings and religions 
*The '''[[Elders of the Path]]''', a [[Religion|cult]] on [[Trymant IV]]
**The '''[[Council of Elders]]''' of the Elders of the Path
*The [[Council of Elders (Path of the Open Hand)|'''Council of Elders''']] of the [[Path of the Open Hand]] [[religion|cult]]
*[[Ewok]] [[Council of Elders (Ewok)|'''Council of Elders''']]
*[[Naboo]] [[Elders (Naboo)|'''Elders''']]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaanian]] [[Council of Elders (Alderaan)|'''Council of Elders''']]
*[[Borokii]] [[Borokii Council of Elders|'''Council of Elders''']]
*[[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] [[Council of Elders (Cerea)|'''Council of Elders''']]
*[[Elders of Gand]]
*[[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Council of Elders (Ewok)/Legends|'''Council of Elders''']] (multiple; various tribes)
*The '[[Grand Hutt Council/Legends|''Hutt Ruling Council''']], also known as the '''Council of Elders'''
*[[Glee Anselm]] [[Council of Elders (Glee Anselm)|'''Council of Elders''']]
*The '''[[Council of Ithorian Elders]]'''
*[[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinian]] [[Council of Elders (Klatooinian)|'''Council of Elders''']]
*The [[Melida/Daan/Legends|Melida/Daan]] [[Elders (Melida/Daan)|'''Elders''']] faction
*[[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] [[Elders (Naboo)/Legends|'''Elders''']]
*[[Nar Kreeta]] '''[[Mining Guild elders]]'''
*[[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister '''elders''']]
*[[Nuiwit]] [[Council of Elders (Nuiwit)|'''Council of Elders''']]
*[[Oswaft]] [[Elders (Oswaft)|'''Elders''']]
*[[Rakata/Legends|Rakatan]] [[Elders (Rakatan)|'''Elders''']]
*[[Saurton]] [[Council of Elders (Saurton)|'''Council of Elders''']]
*[[Skakoan/Legends|Skakoan]] [[Elders (Skakoan)|'''Elders''']]
*[[Ssi-ruuvi Imperium|Ssi-Ruuvi]] '''[[Elders' Council]]'''
*[[Tasariq]] [[Council of Elders (Tasariq)|'''Council of Elders''']]
*[[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] [[Council of Elders (Yinchorri)|'''Council of Elders''']]
*[[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Wookiee Chieftain|'''Elders''']]

'''Elders''' may also refer to the  of , which were a faction in the [[Young–Elders War]], not a legislature.
{{Disambig}}

|es=Ancianos
|ja=エルダー
}}
